samples:
I wonder if you're still around
If not, I guess we didn't know each other as long as we should have
It's been a while since we played outside
And I wonder if the leaves are still on the trees


We all like different things, I guess
But it's hard to believe that some people don't realize what they've got
You put your heart into this love
And I wish that I was there for you when they cut it out of your chest


We both laughed at the ceiling
While everything around us seemed fine and dandy
Then the floor gave way beneath our feet
As though we were walking in an empty valley


Look ahead where we came from
It's a good place to be
And thank you very much for nothing


The more I look back on it
The less I see
It makes me sad for you
And happy for me


What you've done is great
For now, just sit back and watch the show
Our lips are sealed with silver foil
Don't ever let it go

All circles created with intention
Intentions born within the shell of a
Vast chasm
And all that it holds


Holding hearts in noose of deception
Be mine forever, my love


Wreaking vengeance on behalf of the fallen
Seeming distance
The eyes have all fallen long behind us
And we are alone here
In this shadow play


Engage with
Unrelenting fury
Wage war
For the sake of the fallen
Fight on
Our last stand


We will fight until our dying breath
Death is sudden
Always shocking
Shattered dreams, empty memories
Neverlasting love


Withering vine
Consumed by forest fire
Bone grave
Stone grave
Bone grave
Stone grave
Bone grave
Stone grave


Given to us at birth
A broken wing
A shattered heart
Fierce beauty
Ridden from the cave
Hollow moon
Broken wings
Spirits haunting me
Reflections
Shades fading
Into the night

There's a feeling I get sometimes
When the sky opens up and pours
It soothes my soul and soothes the droughts
And it brings all men, women and children


Aww, now you see me walking through the door
I just got back from playing some ball
Don't cry for me if I break your heart 'cause I won't mind at all
As soon as I step outside, I can breathe in the atmosphere


Bulls roar loud
Grown from dirt and bone
Shatter skulls with teeth made of horn
Lay waste to all that don't serve us well
Leaving desolation where there used to be


Hey! Hey!
Hey! Hey!

There's a feeling I get sometimes
When the sky opens up and pours
It soothes my soul and soothes the droughts
And it brings all men, women and children


Now we know why
We have come this far
Our hearts alive, our heads are scarred
Letting loose the beast within
Leave him bleeding on the ground
And when he crawls no sound

The storm is coming down
And sweeping through the trees
Cleansing spirit
Dispelling dreams
The earth is shaking now
Giving way to days
Lift us up


Our hearts, our souls, our minds
Bending all alike
The moon devours the sun
As we gaze on high
Fire in the eye of mankind
Burn your game plan


All circles made with intention
I wonder if you still feel this pressure?
It's a race that will never end
Through the valley and over the mountain



We came into view
A sight to behold
Leaving no one behind
Letting loose control




Running from the beast
An ocean turns yellow
Throw it all away
Take the first step
Run for your life
Breakneck speed
White-knuckle ride
No escape
Taken down


All circles made with intention
I wonder if you still feel this pressure?
It's a race that will never end
Through the valley and over the mountain

The forest is growing faster than you can tell
The shadows creep closer as the light begins to fade
All that I desire is for us to stay
Free from this world we know and never die


We swam in the ether, covered head to toe
Holding hands inside a cavern of crystal glow
Visions we create hold no fears at all
A race toward our goals with hearts full of pride

Spirits alive within my control
As passion grows stronger so does the swell
I ride through fire, blood runs the well
With visions of sailing through ocean swells


Taking breath before I dive into the deep end
Leave this world behind and vow to return again
Death surrounds me, but it will not stop me
I have seen the light flash through the cracks in time




Sensing energy, vibrating frequencies
Frequencies
Vibrating, sensing energy

Chasing ghosts in dreams of ancient empires
Ancient empires
Chasing ghosts in dreams of ancient empires
Ancient empires

This valley has burst my skull
My heart is spinning faster than the earth can wind
I need a place to lay me down
A darkened room will sooth the eyes and calm the soul


You've got your hand on my heart
It hurts, it bleeds like life blood
If you don't mind then I could use some aspirin
And put some time into the wind


You're standing in the doorway
With your hands inside your pockets
Leaving us here all alone
To drown in our own vomit


I wonder what they would say if we were there right now
We're stuck in this dead end valley for years and years
Will we ever escape? It seems next to impossible
All we have left are these pictures in our heads


You've got your hand on my heart
It hurts, it bleeds like life blood
If you don't mind then I could use some aspirin
And put some time into the wind

The only thing that gives me strength to stand
Is knowing that one day this valley will be dry
Another mountain will come into view
When this rock slides down, where will I be?
At peace with myself or full of doubt?

It was the second time around
I tore through every stoplight
Just to see your pretty face
It's amazing how you change my body
My heart is beating faster than I can breathe


You and I were standing on a bridge
Looking down upon this valley of despair
Our hearts were filled with pride
And we thought that we could fly
But our wings were cut from shattered glass

How many times have I been told?
There's never any reason to escape
The moment that you run away
Is the moment that I turn around and chase you
Please, calm me down so that I can breathe again

Will it ever come to this?
We are here for all mankind
This isn't what I had planned
You didn't think there was any risk


You and I were standing on a bridge
Looking down upon the valley of despair
Our hearts were full of pride
And we thought that we could fly
But our wings were cut from shattered glass

It's gone away
I wish it could stay
All this time I've tried to bury you
You just keep on coming back again
And we all know that it ain't right


They try to smother me with all the lies they tell
They say, "Go home and leave the black sheep for us all"
But they can't see there's no one left at all
When she comes calling and your heart is cold as stone

The feeling surrounds me
Like a love that's just died
Just let me breathe
Let me be free




What have we done?
How will I ever undo this mess?
We came into this valley of bones with hearts alive
Now all that remains is a pile of ash and bone
With my hands tied behind my back, please show mercy

Open up the door and let the light in
Show some compassion or risk watching you burn
Letting go isn't always a bad thing
If you trust yourself, you'll never get caught in the black hole

This is where I lose the feeling in my fingertips
And my tongue goes numb
I wonder what tomorrow brings
With this broken wing

I hear a sound inside my head
As if someone's choking me with lead
It comes from deep within my skull
A sudden pain, and then it's gone


You come calling me back home
To rest where I lay low
Into your arms I'll fall
Hoping you will catch me all

The weight of this world is heavy on my shoulders
Feel it pull on me
Constantly I turn to sea
Seeking crystal clarity

The vision that guides my way
Bulls roar loud, rattle snake skin grey
Look behind us at our graves
Wondering how we ever came this far


You come calling me back home
To rest where I lay low
Into your arms I'll fall
Hoping you will catch me all

We've run out of time
If we want to escape
There's only one thing left to say
When the sun falls into the sea
Take my hand and lead the way

Taken from the ash-grave
Born in ancient fire's breath

I feel it surround me
As we burn inside our graves


The walls come tumbling down
Barren eyes are staring
At the earth and moon all around us
And I wonder where have we gone?


Earth, wind, water, fire
Energies renewed
Bring the mountain down to size
Consequences do come with change

You try to reason with a mountain of one-ton slabs
You cannot run forever, you know that is right
There's no escape here, if you think so then just try
If you remain grounded, you can save yourself and I'll help you stand


Letting go never felt this good
It brings back memories too
Visions of war guide the way
To lead us into the blue


Death of a Godhead
Bulls roar loud
Lay waste to empire
Seizure of power


Burn your insides out
With a hellhound at your feet
No escape will ever do
Heed the warnings we've been told
